category_sources: Official GNU ed page describes GNU ed as a line-oriented text editor.
source_facts.description says ed is a classic UNIX line editor.
display_name_sources: Official GNU documentation uses GNU ed.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNU ed page.
docs_sources: Official GNU ed page links to the online manual at manual/ed_manual.html.
The GNU ed manual is hosted on gnu.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; GNU projects use Savannah for official Git hosting, and GNU ed is distributed from GNU/Savannah release infrastructure.
tags_sources: Official GNU ed manual describes ed as line-oriented and command-line oriented.
source_facts.description says classic UNIX line editor.
